Gender Equality.reason: Directly promotes gender equality (Target 5.1) by being a co-ed class, as explicitly stated in the course title '體育[男女合班]' (Physical Education[man and woman]).

Reduced Inequalities.reason: Promotes social inclusion irrespective of sex (Target 10.2) and ensures equal opportunity (Target 10.3) by being a co-ed class: '體育[男女合班]' (Physical Education[man and woman]).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: A very tenuous link to partnerships (Target 17.17) is inferred from the course's emphasis on '團隊合作的方式' (the way of teamwork) at a micro-level.
